title: rubus × rugatus
intro: Rubus × rugatus, also known as the rugose blackberry, is a hybrid species of blackberry that is a cross between the Rubus argutus and Rubus allegheniensis. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × rugatus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Rubus × rugatus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
